untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a 60-day slope indicator (slope of trendline) which is not available in the allowed indicator list. The source text references 'slope' of a trendline, which cannot be directly computed from standard indicators without a dedicated slope/linear regression indicator. Substituted with SMA crossover as a reasonable trend-following approximation.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_6 references a 60-day slope indicator that is not in the allowed set. Without access to a slope or linear regression indicator, the direction reversal logic has been approximated using SMA_50 crossovers as a practical trend-following proxy. The actual slope calculation would require computing the derivative of a fitted trendline over 60 periods.
